title: Toby King (rugby league)
description: England and Ireland international rugby league footballer
extract:
Toby King (born 9 July 1996) is a professional rugby league footballer who plays as a centre for the Warrington Wolves in the Betfred Super League. He has played for Ireland, England and the England Knights at international level. 
He has spent time on loan from Warrington at the Rochdale Hornets in the Championship, as well as season-long loans at both the Huddersfield Giants and the Wigan Warriors in the Super League.
King made his England debut on 29 April 2023 in the 64-0 victory over France at the Halliwell Jones Stadium.
He will join the London Broncos ahead of the 2027 Super League season.
